title: helianthemum guttatum var. serratum
intro: Helianthemum guttatum var. serratum, also known as rockrose or silver-leaved rockrose, is a plant species in the family Cistaceae that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that may aid in wound healing and reducing inflammation. The health benefits of Helianthemum guttatum var. serratum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. It can be prepared for herbal use in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
